articles.title: Home of the Week: Built at the Bicentennial, a 1700s Colonial reproduction for $589k
articles.description:
George Washington would likely feel at home in this house, but he missed it by a couple centuries

The post Home of the Week: Built at the Bicentennial, a 1700s Colonial reproduction for $589k appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore a 1700s Colonial reproduction home listed for $589k in Boston.
The house was built during the 1976 Bicentennial celebration.
Potential for historic charm appeals to local homebuyers seeking unique properties.

articles.title: Are these Boston-area colleges really $100K a year? It’s complicated.
articles.description:
While the total costs at some area colleges do exceed 100K, what students are actually paying varies significantly.

The post Are these Boston-area colleges really $100K a year? It’s complicated. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston-area college costs can exceed $100K, but actual student payments vary widely.
Some institutions, like Harvard and MIT, have total costs over $100K per year.
Students and families need to understand financial aid options to manage expenses.
